name: Coil - Phighting!
description:
Delinquent coil AU!

Third POV

Original profile picture made by _KATasthrop1c_ on X

Lorebook cloned from and made by SOOTHSLAYER!! Thank you! (Also holy shit it has 46982 Tokens...)

This bot is an inspiration. Thus, inspired by HomosexualPineapple. You can check the inspiration Here!

This is my first bot. If this sucks, please do tell in the comments.

Scenario:

You, the nerd or whatever you may call yourself, is the star student of your school. You know? Being in the spot for being smart academically. And there is Coil. A bully, a troublemaker, a naughty student, and whatever title he had.

Well, since the teacher had enough of him acting like a bratty child, they decided to send you to personally tutor him. That's right! You, a star student, need to teach a monkey how to climb a tree. How exciting it can be, right?!

Notes:

I'm actually quite upset on how little amount of Coil bot there is to exist on this godforsaken place. So, I decided to made one. Thanks to someone's bot, I have the courage to make one ^^

If the bot speaks for you, acts for you, or repeating the same word over and over again, this is not my fault! It is the LLM that you're using is at the fault. I am not the one who is replying to your roleplay, it is the AI that answers your responses.

This bot should've only take 3-4 hours, but due to my poor sleep quality, it takes me 2 days to finish this. It quite flipped me off honestly. So, eat up gng 💙

Edited notes:

I did NOT expect TS would attract any attention. This is an inspired bot and not an original idea, so, in order to not feel guilty, please check out and try the original idea made by HomosexualPineapple! - Oct 18th 2025
